prose: **Water frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, **gas phase**, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: built from user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/water/water.xyz` file. SCF converged after 7 cycles. HOMO = -8.6037183 eV, LUMO = 0.33695037 eV → **gap ≈ 8.9406687 eV** (Koopmans-style orbital gap). The calculation logged live to a file named `frontier_orbitals_<timestamp>.out` in your current working directory. No warnings reported.
